taskDescription: Connecting to Gmail and saving email data.

For the PDF report, what specific information would you like included? For example:
Are there any specific types of emails you'd like me to focus on or filter out (like newsletters, promotions, work emails, etc.)?
Feel free to answer one or more questions. Or just ask me to choose the appropriate answers and move forward!
